cms.task_text: Seřaďte bloky tak, aby želva nakreslila [hlp]písmeno F[/hlp] (svislý tah 80, horní tah 60, střední tah 40 bodů).
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" id="b1" x="20" y="20"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field></block><block type="turtle_right" id="b2" x="160" y="20"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="b3" x="20" y="120"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="b4" x="160" y="120"></block><block type="turtle_backward" id="b5" x="20" y="220"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field></block><block type="turtle_right" id="b6" x="160" y="220"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="b7" x="300" y="20"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field></block><block type="turtle_left" id="b8" x="300" y="120"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="b9" x="300" y="220"></block><block type="turtle_forward" id="b10" x="100" y="320"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_forward" id="b1" x="50" y="50"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="b2"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b3"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_up" id="b4"><next><block type="turtle_backward" id="b5"><field name="DISTANCE">60</field><next><block type="turtle_right" id="b6"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b7"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_left" id="b8"><field name="ANGLE">90</field><next><block type="turtle_pen_down" id="b9"><next><block type="turtle_forward" id="b10"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
